title: How Does Monday.com Work Exactly?
excerpt: Hello everyone. This is my Tech website. It is slowly growing and recently I am having issues keeping track of everything. I recently came across Monday.com from one of your ads on our website. I am quite interested but …

posts.author: ZakaryRempel (Zakary Rempel)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello everyone. This is my Tech website. It is slowly growing and recently I am having issues keeping track of everything. I recently came across Monday.com from one of your ads on our website. I am quite interested but still hesitant on whether it will be productive or not. The main issue I am facing is tracking all our employees work and making sure they are doing it correctly. How efficient will Monday.com be for this task?

posts.author: jeromeskiply (Jerome Chambard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ZakaryRempel,
monday.com is highly efficient for this task. Create a board for a project, add an item as a task, and follow the status with column status. You can define teams and define how is responsible for what.
Give it a try!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
